objects_documented.name: EXW_Aml_Limited_Accounts
objects_documented.notes: Fivetran/Google Sheets source — no upstream wiki. All Tier 3.

objects_documented.name: EXW_AML_Users_Report
objects_documented.notes: 55 columns. Writer: SP_EXW_UserSettingsWalletAllowance Part 2 (embedded). AML report with 7-criteria IsAMLProblematic composite flag. 3 Tier 1 from EXW_AMLProviderID.md.

objects_documented.name: EXW_UserSettingsWalletAllowance
objects_documented.notes: 12 columns. Writer: SP_EXW_UserSettingsWalletAllowance Part 1. 5-tag-type priority system (CountryAndRegion, CountryAndRegulation, DynamicGroup, Customer, CountryRegionAndRegulation). StatusMap resolution via External_WalletDB_Eligibility_StatusMap.

objects_documented.name: GetProviderUserIDNormalized
objects_documented.notes: 7-column live view. Dep graph labeled as Function — confirmed View from DDL. INNER JOIN on Dim_Country+Dim_Regulation may exclude unclassifiable customers. CID alias = RealCID.

objects_documented.name: EXW_DimUser_Enriched
objects_documented.notes: 37 columns. Writer: SP_EXW_DimUser_Enriched (TRUNCATE+INSERT). Key: JoinDate=wallet creation date (NOT etoro join date). PEPStatusID=ScreeningStatusID alias. TotalBalanceUSD=current balance (renamed WalletBalanceUSD in EXW_AML_Users_Report). UpperLimit from KYC Q14 mapped to USD thresholds.

objects_documented.name: EXW_ReimbursementFollowUp
objects_documented.notes: 56 columns. Writer: SP_EXW_CompensationClosingCountries Part 2 (also writes EXW_CompensationClosingCountries and EXW_ReimbursementSumTable). Google Sheets via Fivetran sources (AML, AML_US, AML_EEA projects). Column [Date Rate For  Reimbursement] has double space. SP typo 'Poject' vs 'Project' in source. Extraction cutoff hardcoded '2024-01-18'.

objects_documented.name: EXW_C2F_E2E
objects_documented.notes: 103 columns. RECOVERED from prior session disk. Multi-source: WalletConversionDB + EXW_Wallet + eMoney_dbo + DWH_dbo dims. Writer: SP_EXW_C2F_E2E. DELETE+INSERT by date. Hash(GCID).

objects_documented.name: EXW_FactBalance
objects_documented.notes: 13 columns. Writer: SP_EXW_FactBalance (DELETE+INSERT by @d). Hash(GCID). Daily balance snapshot per wallet × crypto. Balance=ISNULL(x,0); BalanceUSD=Balance×AvgPrice. 6 legacy BTC P2SH addresses excluded. Phase 16: 8.51/10.

objects_documented.name: EXW_FactConversions
objects_documented.notes: 46 columns (not 47 — earlier count error). Hash(SendingGCID). No ETL SP in SSDT — feature deprecated June 2023; likely ADF/CopyFromLake pipeline. Two-sided C2C swap table. RecievingGCID has legacy misspelling. Phase 16: 7.58/10.

objects_documented.name: EXW_ReimbursementSumTable
objects_documented.notes: 5 columns. ROUND_ROBIN CCI. Always exactly 7 rows. Writer: SP_EXW_CompensationClosingCountries Part 3 (TRUNCATE+INSERT from #union). 7 hardcoded Population string values with extra whitespace in some. Phase 16: 9.13/10.

objects_documented.name: Hourly_CustomerBalances
objects_documented.notes: 7 columns. Hash(CryptoID). HEAP. Platform-wide aggregate (NOT per-GCID). Writer: SP_EXW_Hourly (TRUNCATE+INSERT; same SP writes all 6 Hourly_* tables). 4-day rolling window (today/today-1/today-2/today-3). USDBalance from #DailyPrices temp table. Same 6-address blacklist as SP_EXW_FactBalance. Phase 16: 8.88/10.

objects_documented.name: Hourly_OmnibusBalances
objects_documented.notes: Writer: SP_EXW_Hourly. Per-wallet omnibus balance snapshot (Gcid≤0 internal wallets). 4-day rolling window. 3 T1 from V_BI_WalletBalances.

objects_documented.name: Hourly_RedeemActivity
objects_documented.notes: Writer: SP_EXW_Hourly. 7-day redeem aggregate. GROUP BY AvgPrice may create multiple rows per Date/CryptoID. All T2.

objects_documented.name: Hourly_WalletInventory
objects_documented.notes: Writer: SP_EXW_Hourly. Native-coin wallet pool aggregate — ERC-20 excluded. 7-source staging. All T2.

objects_documented.name: Hourly_WalletAllocations
objects_documented.notes: Writer: SP_EXW_Hourly. CustomerWalletsView 12 T1 passthrough. CrytpoType typo preserved in DDL/SP.

objects_documented.name: Hourly_Transactions
objects_documented.notes: Writer: SP_EXW_Hourly. 5-day tx log. 7 Activity branches. Received txns excluded (NULL TypeId). 15 T1 from TransactionsView.

objects_documented.name: EXW_C2P_E2E
objects_documented.notes: 90 cols all T2. C2P=crypto→trading position (Dec 2025 feature). CompensationReasonID=134, TargetPlatformID=3, ConversionCycle=2 values (Full Cycle/Other). Writer: SP_EXW_C2F_E2E C2P branch (lines 1062-1675).

objects_documented.name: EXW_CompensationClosingCountries
objects_documented.notes: 22 cols. Incremental INSERT+UPDATE (not standard DELETE+INSERT). AML/AML_US/AML_EEA Fivetran Google Sheet sources. SP typo 'Poject' vs 'Project'. All T2.

objects_documented.name: EXW_FactRedeemTransactions
objects_documented.notes: 29 cols (DDL line 31 = col 29). Selective DELETE by RedeemID+INSERT — re-run pattern for late receives. 3 deprecated NULL cols: eToroFeeAmount, ReceivedBlockchainFees, TotalSentAmountInBCTX. All T2.

objects_documented.name: EXW_FinanceReportsBalancesNew
objects_documented.notes: 37 cols. ROUND_ROBIN+CLUSTERED INDEX(BalanceDateID,RealCID). Daily balance snapshot with 4-condition AMLClosureEvent. Balance cascade: BitgoValue>BloxValue>BloxBalance. Forward-fill from prev day. ComplianceClosureEvent=0 hardcoded. XRP Reserved added 2026-04-06. All T2.

objects_documented.name: EXW_FirstTimeWalletsAndUsers
objects_documented.notes: 13 cols. DELETE+INSERT by FullDateID. Daily aggregate counting new wallet users (NewUsers=first-time wallet login) vs new wallet openings (NewWallets=first wallet asset). Per geo×crypto×regulation group. Sources: New_UsersAndWallets_Inventory, CustomerWalletsView, EXW_DimUser, EXW_DimUser_Enriched, CryptoTypes. HASH(FullDateID) HEAP. Phase 16: 8.9/10.

objects_documented.name: EXW_InternalWallet
objects_documented.notes: 10 cols. TRUNCATE+INSERT (no date param). System/internal wallets (Gcid≤0 only). 8 T1 from CustomerWalletsView upstream wiki. InternalWalletTypeId: 1=Redeem,2=Conversion,3=Funding,4=Payment,6=C2F,7=StakingRefund. UpdateDate=CAST(cw.Occurred AS DATETIME) NOT GETDATE — wallet event time, not ETL time. HASH(CryptoId) CCI. Phase 16: 9.35/10.

objects_documented.name: EXW_WalletEntity
objects_documented.notes: 14 cols. DELETE+INSERT by DateID. Daily snapshot per GCID per date of legal entity assignment. 8-branch WalletEntity CASE: (1) T&C history entity, (2) per-customer tag, (3) eToroDA Spain/Cyprus CySEC JoinDate 2024-12-18 to 2025-06-11, (4) eToroEU Spain/Cyprus CySEC JoinDate 2025-06-11 to 2025-06-13, (5) eToroSEY Malaysia FSA-SEY JoinDate>=2024-12-18, (6) settings post-2025-06-13 not Excluded, (7) settings eToroGermany/eToroUS (SelectedValue 2,3), (8) default eToroX. JoinDate=wallet creation not platform reg. HASH(GCID) CLUSTERED INDEX(DateID). SR-318875/SR-355988 in git. Phase 16: 9.1/10.

objects_documented.name: EXW_WalletInventory
objects_documented.notes: 19 cols. TRUNCATE+INSERT (no date param). Complete WalletPool slot inventory — both occupied (GCID assigned) and free (NULL GCID). Native-chain only filter (WHERE dd.CryptoID = dd.BlockchainCryptoId; ct.CryptoID=ct.BlockchainCryptoId = native tokens only). WalletID=WalletPoolID duplicate cols (same WalletPool.WalletId). CryptoID prefers ERC-20 CryptoIdERC for allocated wallets. 8 T1 from WalletPool+CustomerWalletsView upstream wikis. HASH(GCID) HEAP. Phase 16: 9.05/10.

objects_documented.name: EXW_WalletLogins
objects_documented.notes: 7 cols. DELETE WHERE CAST(LoggedInOn AS DATE)=@date + INSERT (incremental by date). Source: Fact_CustomerAction ActionTypeID=14 (Login from STS audit) JOIN Dim_Customer HasWallet=1. ApplicationIdentifier='retoro' hardcoded. EnvironmentDetails=NULL hardcoded placeholder. No DateID col (date filtering via CAST on datetime). 4 T1 from Fact_CustomerAction wiki. HASH(GCID) HEAP. Phase 16: 9.43/10.

objects_documented.name: EXW_ECPBank
objects_documented.notes: 33 cols. Fivetran-loaded ECP Bank (acquiring bank) transaction reports. ROUND_ROBIN+CCI. All T4 — external bank data, no upstream wiki. ARN=acquirer_ref_ cross-links to SimplexChargebacks. UTI=regulatory reconciliation key. transaction_date/posting_date/expiry_date/cross_rate stored as bigint — encoding format unverified.

objects_documented.name: EXW_EOMReportingBalances
objects_documented.notes: 44 cols. EOM regulatory balance snapshot. HASH([eToro Unique ID 1 GCID])+HEAP. 2 T1 from Wallet.Wallets (GCID→Wallet.Wallets.Gcid, eToro Wallet Identifier→Wallet.Wallets.WalletId). Successor to EXW_ReportingBalances — adds IsValidCustomer/VerificationLevelID/PlayerLevelID/ReportingDateID. Column names with spaces (regulatory export format). LTD/MTD 'Recieved' misspelling. [ Closing Balance Date] has leading space. TrackerBalance=external blockchain tracker. KnownIssueWallet flag separates problem wallets from Reporting Balance.

objects_documented.name: EXW_FactPayments
objects_documented.notes: 28 cols. Fiat-to-crypto payment fact table. HASH(GCID)+HEAP. 15 T1: PaymentID/ProviderPaymentID/WalletID/AmountInFiat/FiatID/CorrelationID/RequestDate/CryptoId from Wallet.Payments + ExchangeRate/ToAddress/AmountInCrypto/EtoroFeePercentage/EtoroFeeCalculated/ProviderFeeCalculated/EstimatedBlockChainFee from Wallet.PaymentTransactions. Key renames: RequestDate=Wallet.Payments.Occurred, AmountInFiat=Amount, AmountInCrypto=PaymentTransactions.Amount. FiatID: 1=USD/2=EUR/3=GBP/5=AUD. ~114K rows, last record Sept 2022 (Simplex era). Fee: EtoroFeePercentage+EtoroFeeCalculated+ProviderFeeCalculated+EstimatedBlockChainFee+BlockChainFee.

objects_documented.name: EXW_PaymentReconciliation
objects_documented.notes: 44 cols. 3-way reconciliation: WalletDB + Simplex provider + ECP Bank. HASH(GCID)+HEAP. Same 15 T1 as EXW_FactPayments. Extends FactPayments with: RealCID (CID from etoro DB), SimplexCurr/SimplexAmountCurr/SimplexProcessTime/SimplexAmountUSD, ECPTranDate/ECPPostDate/ECPType/Card/ECPStatus/ECPAmout/ECPCommission/ECPNetAmount/ECPAdditionalCharge, bin_country/bank_name/UTI/last_4_digits. KNOWN TYPO: ECPAmout (missing 'n'). last_4_digits as numeric(18,0) — leading zero risk.

objects_documented.name: EXW_ReportingBalances
objects_documented.notes: 40 cols. Predecessor to EXW_EOMReportingBalances. HASH([eToro Unique ID 1 GCID])+CLUSTERED INDEX(ReportingDate). Same 2 T1 from Wallet.Wallets. Missing vs EOMReportingBalances: IsValidCustomer/VerificationLevelID/PlayerLevelID/ReportingDateID. Stricter NOT NULL: ReportingDate/KnownIssueWallet/[Closed Country AND Regulation]/[User was Compensated during Country Closure]. Public Wallet Address nvarchar(100) vs max. Same column name quirks (spaces, leading space, misspellings).

objects_documented.name: EXW_SimplexChargebacks
objects_documented.notes: 16 cols. Simplex external chargeback report — NOT same as Wallet.Chargebacks (WalletDB). HASH(Payment_ID)+CCI. All T4. Payment_ID=Simplex string ref (NOT Wallet.Payments.Id bigint). ARN→EXW_ECPBank.acquirer_ref_. Payment_ID→EXW_FactPayments.ProviderPaymentID. Is_Simplex_Liable=liability flag (Yes/No). Chargeback_Type/Reason_Code/Reason_Description=card network codes. [Chbk_AMT ($)] bracket notation required ($+space in name). [CB Funds Status] bracket notation. CB Funds Status nvarchar(3256) unusually wide (may contain notes/JSON).

objects_documented.name: EXW_WalletEntity
objects_documented.notes: 14 cols. Daily snapshot (DELETE+INSERT per @d). HASH(GCID)+CI(DateID). Writer: SP_EXW_WalletEntity by Inessa (2024-12-15). WalletEntity=8-branch CASE priority: T&C entity→per-customer tag→eToroDA→eToroEU→eToroSEY→settings-based→eToroGermany/eToroUS→eToroX. eToroDA: CountryID IN(191,54), CySEC, JoinDate 2024-12-18 to 2025-06-11. eToroEU: same countries 2025-06-11 to 2025-06-13. eToroSEY: CountryID=123(Malaysia), FSA-SEY, JoinDate>=2024-12-18. CountryID=169 is Excluded from settings-based assignment. EntityNames from BI_DB_dbo.External_WalletDB_Dictionary_EtoroLegalEntities. 9 T1 from Wallet.CustomerTermsAndConditions + Wallet.TermsAndConditions + Customer.CustomerStatic + BackOffice.Customer.

objects_documented.name: EXW_WalletUsers_30_Days
objects_documented.notes: 10 cols. TRUNCATE+INSERT, no date param. HASH(GCID)+HEAP. 3 T1 from Customer.CustomerStatic+BackOffice.Customer via EXW_DimUser. LoggedIn30Days=1 if BI_DB_CIDFirstDates.LastLoggedIn>=GETDATE()-31. Transaction30Days=1 if EXW_FactTransactions has qualifying row (TranDateID>=GETDATE()-31, NOT IN(10,13)). Continent from hardcoded 250-row ISO #countryandcontinent table in SP. CASE WHEN Country='eToro' THEN 'eToro' ELSE Continent (internal accounts). SP uses SELECT DISTINCT. Author: Guy Manova 2019-01-20, migrated by Inessa 2024-04-02.

objects_documented.name: EXW_Staking_Allowed_Country
objects_documented.notes: 12 cols. All StakingAllowed=0 (ETH staking discontinued). HASH(CountryID)+HEAP. Written by SP_EXW_WalletElligibleCountries (same SP as Payment+Conversion+EligibleCountries). ResourceName pattern: 'cryptos/{N}/allowstakingmode'. Priority resolution: CountryAndRegion>Country>GeoRegistrationDate by RestrictionWeight. US expanded to per-state rows via Dim_State_and_Province.

objects_documented.name: EXW_Payment_Allowed_Country
objects_documented.notes: 16 cols. All PaymentAllowed=0 (Simplex payments discontinued). HASH(CountryID)+HEAP. PaymentAllowed=AllowedUserSelectedValue='true' AND CryptosSelectedValue='true'. Two separate settings groups: AllowedUser* (user-level eligibility) and Cryptos* (crypto-level eligibility). Both must be 'true' for payment to be allowed.

objects_documented.name: EXW_Conversion_Allowed_Country
objects_documented.notes: 21 cols. All flags=0 (crypto conversions discontinued). HASH(CountryID)+HEAP. Note: Country column precedes CountryID in DDL (unlike other Allowed_Country tables). CountryID is nullable (unlike other Allowed_Country tables). FromConversionAllowed=AllowedUserSelectedValue='true' AND FromSelectedValue='true'. ToConversionAllowed=AllowedUserSelectedValue='true' AND ToSelectedValue='true'. Three settings groups: AllowedUser*, From*, To*.

objects_documented.name: EXW_FCA_UserLogin
objects_documented.notes: 18 cols. Daily DELETE+INSERT per @d_i. HASH(GCID)+HEAP. Near-perfect passthrough of Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID=14, filtered to EXW_Wallet.CustomerWalletsView. 9 T1 from Fact_CustomerAction (which inherits from STS/Billing.Login/Customer.CustomerStatic). 'FCA' in name is misnomer — all wallet users included, not FCA-regulated only. ActionTypeID always 14. IsReal always 1. DemoCID always 0. PlatformID→Dim_Product.ProductID (badly named). CountryIDByIP=IP geolocation at login time (may differ from registered country).

objects_documented.name: RemovePrefix
objects_documented.notes: Scalar function. @Input VARCHAR(MAX), @Delimiter VARCHAR(10) → VARCHAR(MAX). Returns text AFTER the LAST occurrence of @Delimiter using REVERSE+CHARINDEX. Returns @Input unchanged if delimiter not found. Example: RemovePrefix('cryptos/2/allowstakingmode','/') → 'allowstakingmode'. Utility for parsing EXW_Settings ResourceName paths.

objects_documented.name: RemoveSuffix
objects_documented.notes: Scalar function. @Input VARCHAR(MAX), @Delimiter VARCHAR(10) → VARCHAR(MAX). Returns text BEFORE the FIRST occurrence of @Delimiter using CHARINDEX+LEFT. Returns @Input unchanged if delimiter not found. Example: RemoveSuffix('cryptos/2/allowstakingmode','/') → 'cryptos'. Utility for parsing EXW_Settings ResourceName paths. Complement to RemovePrefix.

next_batch.notes: Batch 11 = staking cluster (4 staking tables) + Simplex mapping table. All depth-0 leaf tables with no SSDT SP writers. EXW_SimplexMapping likely maps Simplex payment IDs to internal WalletDB IDs. Staking tables cover ETH staking rewards infrastructure (BI snapshots, parameters, user rewards).

skipped_objects.name: EXW_C2F_LastStatus
skipped_objects.reason: No DDL found in SSDT (appears in dependency graph but no corresponding SQL file)

glossary.GCID: Global Customer ID — cross-product identity key for eToro wallet customers. Cast from bigint (WalletDB) to int (Synapse EXW_dbo). Distribution key across all EXW_dbo HASH-distributed tables.
glossary.CID: Alias for RealCID in EXW_ReimbursementFollowUp and GetProviderUserIDNormalized view. Equivalent to RealCID elsewhere.
glossary.RealCID: etoro platform customer ID. Added to wallet tables by joining to EXW_DimUser or Dim_Customer on GCID.
glossary.UserWalletAllowance: Settings-resolved wallet eligibility: 'Allowed', 'ReadOnly', 'NotAllowed'. Sourced from EXW_UserSettingsWalletAllowance (Part 1 of SP_EXW_UserSettingsWalletAllowance).
glossary.IsAMLProblematic: 7-criteria composite flag in EXW_AML_Users_Report: 1 if PlayerStatus not in (1,5,12), RiskGroupID≠0, ScreeningStatusID not in (0,1), RiskScoreName not Low/Medium, RiskClassificationID not in (1,2), UserWalletAllowance≠Allowed, or Age≤25/≥65.
glossary.PEPStatusID: Column in EXW_DimUser_Enriched. Despite name, stores Dim_Customer.ScreeningStatusID (aliased in SP). Join to Dim_ScreeningStatus to resolve name.
glossary.JoinDate_EXW: In EXW_DimUser_Enriched: wallet account creation date (MIN EXW_WalletInventory.Allocated), NOT etoro platform RegistrationDate.
glossary.TotalBalanceUSD: In EXW_DimUser_Enriched: current total wallet balance (SUM at MAX BalanceDateID). Referenced as WalletBalanceUSD in EXW_AML_Users_Report.
glossary.AMLStatus: In EXW_CompensationClosingCountries/EXW_ReimbursementFollowUp: status of AML enforcement case. Terminal values: 'compensated', 'reimbursed', 'completed'.
glossary.WalletVsPlatform: Reconciliation flag in EXW_ReimbursementFollowUp: 7 values comparing wallet-side reimbursement vs platform credit records. 'No Gap' = within $1 tolerance.
glossary.SP_EXW_Hourly_scope: Single SP writing all 6 Hourly_* tables in one execution: Hourly_CustomerBalances, Hourly_OmnibusBalances, Hourly_RedeemActivity, Hourly_WalletInventory, Hourly_WalletAllocations, Hourly_Transactions. TRUNCATE+INSERT pattern. Runs hourly.
glossary.Hourly_CustomerBalances_note: Despite the 'Hourly' prefix, data granularity is DAILY (BalanceDate). Hourly = SP refresh frequency, not data granularity. Platform-wide aggregate (no GCID column) — not per-customer. 4-day rolling window.
glossary.V_BI_WalletBalances_20day: CopyFromLake.WalletDB_Wallet_V_BI_WalletBalances mirrors Wallet.V_BI_WalletBalances which has a 20-day rolling window. Both SP_EXW_FactBalance and SP_EXW_Hourly use this Bronze copy. Reprocessing dates older than 20 days requires the full WalletBalances Bronze table.
glossary.WalletEntity_values: Legal entity values in EXW_WalletEntity.WalletEntity: eToroX (default/catch-all), eToroDA (Spain/Cyprus CySEC Dec2024-Jun2025), eToroEU (Spain/Cyprus CySEC Jun11-13 2025 transition), eToroSEY (Malaysia FSA-SEY since Dec2024), eToroGermany (settings-locked Germany), eToroUS (settings-locked US), plus T&C-derived entity names from EtoroLegalEntities dictionary.
glossary.WalletPool_occupancy: EXW_WalletInventory.Occupied=1 means GCID is assigned; 0 means free in pool. Native-chain only (WHERE CryptoID=BlockchainCryptoId in CryptoTypes). Full TRUNCATE+INSERT on every SP run — no history.
glossary.JoinDate_EXW_WalletEntity: In EXW_WalletEntity.JoinDate: MIN(CustomerWalletsView.Occurred) AS DATE per GCID, restricted to Occurred < @end_date. This is wallet creation date, NOT eToro platform registration date. Same interpretation as EXW_DimUser_Enriched.JoinDate.
glossary.WalletLogins_scope: EXW_WalletLogins covers only HasWallet=1 customers (Dim_Customer join). ActionTypeID=14=Login from STS audit. ApplicationIdentifier always 'retoro' (hardcoded). EnvironmentDetails always NULL (placeholder). No DateID col — use CAST(LoggedInOn AS DATE) for date filtering.
glossary.InternalWallet_UpdateDate: EXW_InternalWallet.UpdateDate = CAST(cw.Occurred AS DATETIME) — wallet event time from WalletDB, NOT ETL GETDATE(). Unique pattern; most other EXW_dbo tables use GETDATE() for UpdateDate.
glossary.ECPBank_note: ECP Bank = acquiring bank for Simplex-processed fiat card payments. Data loaded via Fivetran. ARN (acquirer_ref_) is the cross-system key linking ECP Bank records to Simplex chargebacks. UTI (uti column) is the Unique Transaction Identifier for regulatory matching. All date columns (transaction_date, posting_date, expiry_date) stored as bigint — encoding unverified.
glossary.SimplexEra: Simplex was eToro Wallet's fiat-to-crypto card payment provider. All Simplex-era data (EXW_FactPayments, EXW_PaymentReconciliation, EXW_SimplexChargebacks, EXW_ECPBank) appears to be historical, last active ~September 2022 (confirmed by Wallet.Payments last record date). Feature may have been discontinued or replaced.
glossary.FiatID_values: In EXW_FactPayments/EXW_PaymentReconciliation: FiatID 1=USD, 2=EUR, 3=GBP, 5=AUD. Matches Wallet.FiatTypes.Id in WalletDB.
glossary.ECPAmout_typo: EXW_PaymentReconciliation.ECPAmout is a known column name typo (missing 'n' — should be ECPAmount). Preserved for pipeline compatibility. Always reference as [ECPAmout] in queries.
glossary.EOMReportingBalances_vs_ReportingBalance: EXW_EOMReportingBalances (44 cols, HEAP) is the newer/extended version of EXW_ReportingBalances (40 cols, CLUSTERED INDEX). EOM adds: IsValidCustomer, VerificationLevelID, PlayerLevelID, ReportingDateID. EOM uses HEAP (bulk load optimized); old version uses CLUSTERED INDEX(ReportingDate) (query optimized). Both track same data: per-customer per-asset per-month crypto balances for regulatory reporting.
glossary.WalletChargebacks_vs_SimplexChargebacks: Wallet.Chargebacks (WalletDB) = eToro INTERNAL chargeback record keyed by PaymentId (bigint FK → Wallet.Payments.Id). EXW_SimplexChargebacks = Simplex EXTERNAL chargeback report keyed by Payment_ID (nvarchar, Simplex string ref). These are DIFFERENT data sources for the same chargeback event.
glossary.KnownIssueWallet: Flag in EXW_EOMReportingBalances and EXW_ReportingBalances. Wallets with KnownIssueWallet=1 have documented reconciliation issues between internal records and blockchain. Their balances are isolated in DevReport columns and handled separately in Reporting Balance vs Closing Units Balance.
glossary.TrackerBalance_note: In EXW_EOMReportingBalances and EXW_ReportingBalances: TrackerBalance comes from an external blockchain tracking service (vendor not identified in SSDT). Independent verification of on-chain balance vs eToro's internal records. Has Dif with TrackerBalance='Y' flags discrepancies for investigation.

cross_references.SP_EXW_UserSettingsWalletAllowance: Combined SP writing two tables: Part 1 → EXW_UserSettingsWalletAllowance, Part 2 → EXW_AML_Users_Report. AML report reads the freshly-loaded allowance table in the same SP run.
cross_references.SP_EXW_CompensationClosingCountries: Writes three tables: (1) EXW_CompensationClosingCountries (UPSERT from Google Sheets), (2) EXW_ReimbursementFollowUp (TRUNCATE+INSERT), (3) EXW_ReimbursementSumTable (summary TRUNCATE+INSERT).
cross_references.SP_EXW_Hourly: Single SP writing all 6 Hourly_* tables: (1) Hourly_CustomerBalances — platform aggregate by crypto, (2) Hourly_OmnibusBalances, (3) Hourly_RedeemActivity, (4) Hourly_WalletInventory, (5) Hourly_WalletAllocations, (6) Hourly_Transactions. All TRUNCATE+INSERT. Runs hourly.
cross_references.EXW_DimUser_Enriched_consumers: EXW_AML_Users_Report reads: Country, VerificationLevelID, JoinDate, StatusChangeDate, TotalBalanceUSD (→WalletBalanceUSD), PEPStatusID, RegulationID, PlayerStatusID.
cross_references.GetProviderUserIDNormalized_deps: View reads from EXW_AMLProviderID (B1), EXW_UserSettingsWalletAllowance (B2), Dim_Customer, Dim_PlayerStatus, Dim_Country, Dim_Regulation.
cross_references.SP_EXW_FactBalance_vs_Hourly_CustomerBal: Both use same source (CopyFromLake.WalletDB_Wallet_V_BI_WalletBalances) and same 6-address blacklist. FactBalance = per-wallet daily history; Hourly_CustomerBalances = platform aggregate 4-day rolling window.
cross_references.EXW_FactConversions_column_count: 46 columns (not 47 as initially estimated — prior count was off by 1).
cross_references.SP_EXW_WalletEntity_deps: SP_EXW_WalletEntity(@d) orchestrates: Fact_SnapshotCustomer→#snapprep, CustomerWalletsView→#usersw (JoinDate), WalletDB T&C tables→#userstnc→#changes→#lastregulation, EXW_Settings→#group→#value (country-entity), #userlevel→#userlevelfinal (per-customer), all JOIN in #compile with 8-branch CASE.
cross_references.EXW_WalletInventory_native_filter: SP_EXW_WalletInventory WHERE dd.CryptoID = dd.BlockchainCryptoId resolves to ct.CryptoID = ct.BlockchainCryptoId in CryptoTypes — native blockchain tokens only (e.g., BTC, ETH). ERC-20 wrapper positions excluded. Physical wallet appears once per native chain, not duplicated per ERC-20 layer.
cross_references.SP_WalletLogins_note: SP name is SP_WalletLogins (no EXW_ prefix) — different from the EXW_ SP naming convention. Writes EXW_dbo.EXW_WalletLogins. Date delete uses CAST(LoggedInOn AS DATE)=@date not DateID integer.
cross_references.SP_EXW_Fact_Transactions_pattern: 9-stage temp table pipeline: #prep (filter by date window) → #relevanttx (DISTINCT TranID+ActionTypeId) → #aml (AmlValidations, most-recent Rn) → #sent (SentTransactions WHERE TypeId=1 ONLY for AML) → #amlsent → #ext (UNION ALL Sent+Received with CryptoTypes) → #dcpreprep (Dim_Customer) → #factTXPrep (USD prices via EXW_Price) → #sentredeems/#receivedredeems (IsRedeem received detection) → #final_Fact_Transactions (CASE flags). DELETE+INSERT incremental by TranDate/Occurred/LastStatusUpdateOccurred window.
cross_references.EXW_FactTransactions_EtoroFees_warning: EtoroFees in EXW_FactTransactions = source.EtoroFees × FeeExchangeRate (already rate-normalized). Do NOT re-apply FeeExchangeRate in downstream queries — it has already been applied at load time.
cross_references.EXW_FactTransactions_IsEtoroFee_NULL: IsEtoroFee is always NULL in EXW_FactTransactions — the CASE logic was commented out in SP_EXW_Fact_Transactions (replaced with NULL AS [IsEtoroFee]). Schema column retained for backward compatibility.
cross_references.External_WalletDB_Wallet_TransactionsVie: UC Target: wallet.bronze_walletdb_wallet_transactionsview (confirmed in _generic_pipeline_mapping.json). Generic Pipeline Override strategy, 60-minute cadence from WalletDB etoro-walletdb-prod.
cross_references.EXW_FactTransactions_AML_sent_restrictio: AML join for sent transactions in SP_EXW_Fact_Transactions is restricted to TransactionTypeId=1 (CustomerMoneyOut only) via the #sent temp table filter. Other sent types (Redeem, Conversion, Payment, Staking) will have NULL AMLProviderStatus even if AML records exist for them.
cross_references.EXW_FactConversions_no_writer: EXW_FactConversions has no active SP writer — all rows have UpdateDate = 2024-04-09 (historical one-time load). SP_EXW_Conversions does not exist or is decommissioned. Table is a frozen historical snapshot.

notes: Synapse MCP unavailable (established pattern from DWH batches 12-14 and EXW Batches 1-6). P2/P3 skipped as SOFT failure across all batch objects. All wikis marked with row count and Atlassian items as open in .review-needed.md. Batch 4-5-6 added in Batch 6 session (context file lagged — batches 4-5 objects reconstructed from _index.md data). Batch 6: 5 objects, 31 total documented. WalletPool upstream wiki (CryptoDBs) enabled 8 T1 in EXW_WalletInventory and EXW_InternalWallet. WalletEntity SP is the most complex in EXW_dbo (~550 lines, 12+ temp tables, 8-branch CASE). SP_WalletLogins uses non-standard naming (no EXW_ prefix). [EXW_Batch 3 — 2026-04-20] MCP available (synapse_prod_sql). P2/P3 ran for all 4 objects. Phase 16 adversarial evaluation introduced and run. EXW_FactTransactions: 45 cols, 21 T1 + 24 T2, HASH(GCID) HEAP, daily DELETE+INSERT. EXW_FactConversions: no active SP writer (frozen 2024-04-09 snapshot).
